name: EdwLoadComsnIncmRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cteMinRunCycle AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'COMSN_MONTHLY' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE tgt SET tgt.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC tgt JOIN cteMinRunCycle c ON tgt.SRC_SYS_CD = c.SRC_SYS_CD AND tgt.TRGT_SYS_CD = c.TRGT_SYS_CD AND tgt.SUBJ_CD = c.SUBJ_CD WHERE tgt.RUN_CYC_NO >= c.RUN_CYC_NO AND tgt.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
DESCRIPTION:  Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.
      
                
                           
PROCESSING:  Extracts the P_RUN_CYC records for IDS MEMBERSHIP with the EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'.  These rows are used to update the P_RUN_CYCLE, load indicator field for the particular source and subject.  All run cycles >= to the current run cycle where the indicator is "N" are updated to "Y".


                
MODIFICATIONS:

Annotations:
EDW  Comsn Incm Run Cyc Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Comsn Incm with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
end of  EDW  Comsn Incm Run Cyc Update
